title: RE: Barked
description: Have you ever wanted to re-bark a tree or have bark related decorations? Then this mod is for you!
body:
### **📝About:**
- Have you ever wanted to re-bark a tree or have bark related decorations? Then this mod is for you!
  
![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **⚙️Features:**
- Supports all of the vanilla logs by default
- Adds 3 type of items (Barks, Bark Panel [With this you can re-bark the stripped log], Fire Starter [You can craft the barks into this wich last longer in furnace.])
- Adds 3 type of blocks (Wall Panels, Hollow Logs, Bark Pathways)
- Adds recipes for all of the items
- All of the item you can use as fuel source which log supports it
- New tag (re_barked:barks)
- For the craftings please see the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/ags-re-barked/gallery).

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **✅Compatible mods:**
SOON TM ;)

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **📜Our partner:**
[![Partner](https://i.ibb.co/JqPjJKf/bisect-hosting2.png)](https://bit.ly/48qCl4b)

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **💡Ideas:**
- If you have an idea which makes the mod better then,
- please write it on our discord server in the **#💡idea-suggestions** forum.

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **👾Bugs:**
- If you have found a bug then,
- please write it on our discord server in the **#🧰bug-reports** forum.

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
